selected_tasks.body_preview: - Day 135 (11:12) assessment agent exited 0 with no provider error but produced no assessment.md and no assess.log transcript. The harness reached planning with zero durable assessment artifacts. - Trajectory graph pressure (2026-07-13T11:16Z): task_analysis_only_attempt_count=2, task_unlanded_source_count=1, task_success_rate=0.0, task_verification_rate=0.0
selected_tasks.expected_evidence: Next session with missing assessment produces a task_01.md whose Evidence section includes trajectory gnome values (e.g., "task_analysis_only_attempt_count=2 from YOUR TRAJECTORY"). Dashboard: assessment_missing sessions produce at least 1 verified task (reduced task_obsolete_count). Implementation Notes: The preseed script already reads trajectory output an
selected_tasks.title: Preseed trajectory-gnome evidence into task_01.md when assessment is missing

selected_tasks.body_preview: - Log feedback corrected top lessons for next run (Day 135 trajectory, score=0.4825): 1. "shell tool commands failed during the session -> prefer bounded commands with explicit paths and inspect exit output before retrying broader checks" 2. "agent read or searched paths that did not exist -> verify guessed paths with rg --files before reading them, then sea
selected_tasks.expected_evidence: Log feedback corrected lessons no longer list "shell tool commands failed" and "agent read or searched paths that did not exist" as top lessons after 3+ sessions. task_success_rate improves (fewer turns wasted on blind retries). Implementation Notes: tool_recovery_hint in src/prompt_retry.rs takes a tool name and error code and returns a hint string. Add cas
selected_tasks.title: Add bounded-command and path-verification recovery hints to bash tool failures

selected_tasks.body_preview: - Day 135 trajectory: task_unlanded_source_count=1 — a task touched source files without landing a source commit. Likely cause: strict verifier rejected the task due to scope mismatch between Files line and actual edits. - Day 135 trajectory: task_verification_rate=0.0 — tasks are failing strict verification. One failure mode is the task body mentioning file
selected_tasks.expected_evidence: Next session: task_manifest quality scores flag cross-reference mismatches. Dashboard: task_quality_score reflects structural issues; fewer tasks reach implementation with Files-vs-body mismatches. task_verification_rate improves (fewer verifier rejections due to scope mismatch). Implementation Notes: FILE_MENTION_RE already extracts file paths from the body
selected_tasks.title: Add cross-reference mismatch detection to task manifest quality scoring
